descriptionShort: Richmond Sockeyes 2025 banner-night or Hall of Fame reunion event footage from March 7.
descriptionLong: This video captures content from the 2025 Richmond Sockeyes commemoration events, likely from the banner-night or BC Hockey Hall of Fame reunion held in March 2025. The timestamp and recent date indicate this is modern archival footage documenting the team's legacy celebration, potentially including interviews, ceremonies, or speeches honoring the 1987 Centennial Cup champions and their alumni.
